name: cc-enslaver
description: A Claude Code plugin and LLM-agnostic rule pack that enforces systematic thinking, verified citations, and root-cause analysis — eliminating reactive, lazy AI behavior. v0.16 adds Stop hook Layer (g) — file-claim verification. read_guard captures per-file mtime baselines on first encounter; stop_guard parses `I edited X.py` / `我修改了 Y.md` claims and blocks the Stop when on-disk state definitively contradicts a claim. Conservative-by-design (no baseline / any ambiguity → pass; CC_ENSLAVER_DISABLE_LAYER_G escape hatch).
